positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration of bioluminescent deep-sea flora and fauna, centered composition. The main subjects are stylized coral structures interwoven with glowing, abstract sea creatures like luminous jellyfish and ethereal anglerfish. Style should be vibrant neo-Art Nouveau meets minimalist vector graphics, emphasizing clean lines and strong silhouettes. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, neon violet, and pops of glowing lime green. The background should be abstract, dark, and textural, suggesting deep ocean depth. Highly scalable, suitable for apparel printing, crisp edges, zero gradients, stylized realism.
negative: blurry, bad anatomy, artifacts, low quality, noisy, grain, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyrighted, cartoon, grayscale, faded, messy, random
